title: WorkTrace Timesheet module — v1
description: Per-user structured timesheet entries. One file per user at modules/timesheet/users/<user_id>.json. Each entry covers one (work_date, project) and includes both a headline summary (for tile views) and the full bullet text (for detail views). The private repo IS the trust boundary — full content is OK to push because only invited team collaborators have read access. No credentials (PATs, session IDs) are ever included.

source_hash.description: sha256 of the timesheet.md slice that produced this JSON. Lets dpsync detect no-op pushes.

work_date.description: The IST work day (Mon 2026-05-11 = the shift starting 14:00 IST on that date).

friendly_name.description: Short alias from config.json project_detection.company_to_project. E.g. 'Genserve'.

headline.description: 1-2 sentence summary for the dashboard tile view. Auto-derived from bullets (Phase 1: first-sentence-join; Phase 2: LLM-summarized).

bullets.description: Full bullet text for the day, in order. Used by the dashboard detail view. Each bullet may span multiple lines (separated by literal newlines in the string).

counts.description: Open-ended counts dict. Common keys: bullets, deploys, creates, modifications, investigations, users_provisioned.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering on the dashboard. E.g. 'code', 'admin-fixes', 'onboarding'.

entry_hash.description: sha256 over (work_date, project.company_name, headline) — idempotency key per entry.
